title: Implement search with Elasticsearch
original_text: Implemented full-text search using Elasticsearch. Added search API with filtering and sorting. Implemented autocomplete for search suggestions. Added faceted search for categories. Implemented search analytics to track queries. Added search result highlighting. Integrated with existing database for indexing. Implemented search result caching. Added tests for search functionality. Result: 55 tests pass.
expected_subject: feat(search): implement full-text search with Elasticsearch
expected_body_lines: - Add search API with filtering and sorting
- Implement search analytics and query tracking
- Add search result highlighting and caching
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(search): implement full-text search with Elasticsearch"
